context: Tests whether the response identifies both the singleton race condition and the shared mutable state bug.

checklist.name: Identifies shared mutable state as primary bug
checklist.description: Explains that storing per-user data in a singleton field means all threads share the same currentUserId — one thread's setUser overwrites another's

checklist.name: Recommends ThreadLocal
checklist.description: Suggests using ThreadLocal<String> for per-thread user context isolation

checklist.name: Identifies double-checked locking issue
checklist.description: Notes the singleton getInstance() has a race condition — two threads could create separate instances (or suggests fixing with synchronized, enum, or holder pattern)

checklist.name: No incorrect information
checklist.description: Response does not contain factually wrong statements about Java concurrency, ThreadLocal, or singleton patterns
